OE14VialMedium.description: A fragile glass vial to hold a medium amount of liquid.

OE14VialMediumReinforced.name: reinforced medium vial
OE14VialMediumReinforced.description: A reinforced glass vial to hold a medium amount of liquid.

OE14BaseAlchemyBomb.name: alchemical bomb
OE14BaseAlchemyBomb.description: A vial of liquid that explodes with an alchemical reagent cloud when thrown.

OE14GroundTobacco.name: ground tobacco
OE14GroundTobacco.description: Grinded and dried tabac leaves, some like it is a cur.

OE14GroundSage.name: ground sage
OE14GroundSage.description: Ground and dried sage root as it turns out is an excellent substitute for tobacco.

OE14SackFarming.name: sack
OE14SackFarming.description: A bag for various fruits, vegetables, plants and anything else that grows in the bed.

OE14SeedWheat.name: wheat seeds
OE14SeedWheat.description: Small wheat seeds. What will you do with them? Grind them into flour, or plant them again?

OE14SeedPumpkin.name: pumpkin seeds
OE14SeedPumpkin.description: Pumpkin seeds. Some pumpkin seems to have been gutted and butchered.

OE14SeedCucumber.name: cucumber seeds
OE14SeedCucumber.description: Are cucumber seeds. You know what to do with them.

OE14SeedTomato.name: tomato seeds
OE14SeedTomato.description: It looks like powder! They're so small, these seeds.

OE14SeedPepper.name: pepper seeds
OE14SeedPepper.description: Pepper seeds, with a peppercorn inside.

OE14SeedSage.name: sage seeds
OE14SeedSage.description: Sage seeds. It's time to grow some fun herbs!

OE14SeedCotton.name: cotton seeds
OE14SeedCotton.description: Cotton seeds. It's time to grow some pants!

OE14GuardBell.name: guard bell
OE14GuardBell.description: A bell used to set the appropriate alert level.

OE14HerbalBandage.name: herbal bandage
OE14HerbalBandage.description: A bandage net woven from grass, not the most reliable or useful thing, but better than nothing.

OE14Gauze.name: gauze
OE14Gauze.description: Dense cloth gauze, to prevent valuable blood from leaking out of the body.

OE14EnergyCrystalBase.description: A crystal shard capable of storing magical energy.

OE14BaseEssence.name: magic essence
OE14BaseEssence.description: Particles of magical energy polarised into a particular type of magic. Will be gone soon, so try to collect them as soon as possible!

OE14RitualChalk.name: ritual chalk
OE14RitualChalk.description: Quartz chalk, handy for drawing temporary ritual circles.

OE14BaseDemiplaneKey.name: demiplane coordinate key
OE14BaseDemiplaneKey.description: A temporary blob of energy linking the real world and the demiplane. Use it before it dissipates.

OE14Rope.name: rope
OE14Rope.description: Multifunctional rope. You can tie something with it. Or someone.

OE14Scissors.name: scissors
OE14Scissors.description: A tool for shredding wool, hair, clothing, and, if not handled carefully, even fingers.

OE14Screwdriver.name: screwdriver
OE14Screwdriver.description: Industrial grade torque in a small screwdriving package.

OE14BaseSharpeningStone.name: sharpening stone
OE14BaseSharpeningStone.description: Allows you to sharpen blunted weapons. If you overdo it, you may well sharpen the weapon completely.

OE14BaseWallpaper.description: Thin paper wallpaper. You can glue them on the walls from different sides, or peel them off with any sharp object.

OE14MagicShadowStaff.name: magic shadow staff
OE14MagicShadowStaff.description: A long, half-tech, half-magic stick designed to convert magical energy into shadow spells.

OE14ModularIronArrow.name: iron arrow
OE14ModularIronArrow.description: Standard arrow, balance between damage and reliability.

OE14ModularMithrilArrow.name: mithril arrow
OE14ModularMithrilArrow.description: An arrow made of expensive wood and magical iron, you shoot money, but the damage matches.

OE14ModularCopperArrow.name: copper arrow
OE14ModularCopperArrow.description: It's the cheapest and weakest arrow you've ever seen, but it's better than nothing.

OE14ModularIronAxe.name: iron axe
OE14ModularIronAxe.description: A heavy axe for cutting firewood or heads.

OE14ModularIronDagger.name: iron dagger
OE14ModularIronDagger.description: A small, multi-purpose, sharp blade. You can cut meat or throw it at a goblin.

OE14ModularIronDaggerTundra.name: Dagger Tundra
OE14ModularIronDaggerTundra.description: A small, multi-purpose, sharp blade. You can cut meat or throw it at a goblin. It has "tundra" engraved on it.

OE14ModularIronDaggerAgony.name: Dagger Agony
OE14ModularIronDaggerAgony.description: A small, multi-purpose, sharp blade. You can cut meat or throw it at a goblin. It has "agony" engraved on it.

OE14ModularIronHammer.name: iron hammer
OE14ModularIronHammer.description: A small hammer. Good for carpentry work as well as for cracking skulls.

OE14ModularIronHoe.name: iron hoe
OE14ModularIronHoe.description: Hoe. Your perfect tool for tilling the ground and preparing it for gardening.

OE14ModularIronMace.name: iron mace
OE14ModularIronMace.description: A heavy piece of metal on a long stick. What could be simpler than that?

OE14ModularIronPickaxe.name: iron pickaxe
OE14ModularIronPickaxe.description: Notched to perfection, for jamming it into rocks

OE14ModularGuildmasterRapier.name: guildmaster's personal rapier
OE14ModularGuildmasterRapier.description: A personal weapon issued to each guildmaster. Combines reliability and killing power.

OE14ModularIronShovel.name: iron shovel
OE14ModularIronShovel.description: An implement for digging up earth, digging beds or graves.

OE14ModularIronSickle.name: iron sickle
OE14ModularIronSickle.description: Originally developed as a weapon against grass, the sickle suddenly proved itself good at the bloodier harvest as well.

OE14ModularIronSpear.name: iron spear
OE14ModularIronSpear.description: The spear is a weapon whose effectiveness has stood the test of time.

OE14ModularIronKunai.name: iron kunai
OE14ModularIronKunai.description: An effective throwing weapon. Throw it at a wall, or no, better yet, at a goblin!

OE14ModularIronSword.name: iron sword
OE14ModularIronSword.description: the gold standard of edged weapons. Medium length, comfortable grip. No frills.

OE14ModularGuardHalberd.name: guard's halberd
OE14ModularGuardHalberd.description: The standard issue armament of the imperial guard. A long iron halberd adorned with blue feathers and brass

OE14BowCombat.name: combat bow
OE14BowCombat.description: A standard ranged weapon, and even without magic.

OE14BowIceArtifact.name: ice bow
OE14BowIceArtifact.description: A magic bow that needs no ammunition.

OE14BaseLightCrossbow.name: light crossbow
OE14BaseLightCrossbow.description: A small, compact crossbow that is comfortable to hold with one hand. Not too accurate on the reverse side.

OE14CrossboltIron.name: iron crossbow bolt
OE14CrossboltIron.description: Rod with a pointed spike in iron. No plumage, they're not bows.

OE14CrossboltGold.name: gold crossbow bolt
OE14CrossboltGold.description: Rod with a pointed spike in gold. No plumage, they're not bows.

OE14CrossboltCopper.name: copper crossbow bolt
OE14CrossboltCopper.description: Rod with a pointed spike in copper. No plumage, they're not bows.

OE14CrossboltMithril.name: mithril crossbow bolt
OE14CrossboltMithril.description: Rod with a pointed spike in mithril. No plumage, they're not bows.

OE14SpikeWhistle.name: spike
OE14SpikeWhistle.description: Organically spiked with an unknown liquid inside.

OE14DPSMeter.name: DPS Meter
OE14DPSMeter.description: Counts the average damage per second. If you stop hitting it, it shows the result.

OE14RoundLeaver.name: distance fog
OE14RoundLeaver.description: You have reached the edge of the game map. There's nothing further. You can use this fog to get out of the game.

OE14StoneWell.name: well
OE14StoneWell.description: At the bottom of this well gurgles clear water. If you have a bucket, you can reach it.

OE14LaddersDownBase.name: stairway down
OE14LaddersDownBase.description: The dark depths of the underworld are calling you.

OE14LaddersUpBase.name: stairway up
OE14LaddersUpBase.description: A way out of the dark underworld into the overworld.

OE14WallmountFlagAlchemist.name: alchemist tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagAlchemist.description: A tapestry with a potion symbol, indicating that alchemists dwell here.

OE14WallmountFlagBlacksmith.name: blacksmith tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagBlacksmith.description: A tapestry with a anvil symbol, indicating that blacksmiths dwell here.

OE14WallmountFlagTavern.name: tavern tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagTavern.description: A tapestry with a beer symbol, indicating that tavern is here.

OE14WallmountFlagBank.name: bank tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagBank.description: A tapestry with a coins symbol indicating that this is where the bankers live.

OE14WallmountFlagBankVault.name: bank vault tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagBankVault.description: A tapestry with a vault symbol indicating that this is where the bank vaults reside.

OE14WallmountFlagBankCrates.name: bank crates tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagBankCrates.description: A tapestry with a crates symbol indicating that this is where the bank vaults reside.

OE14WallmountFlagBankShip.name: bank ship tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagBankShip.description: A tapestry with a ship symbol denoting that there is a ship here to trade with the city.

OE14WallmountFlagBankCommandant.name: commandant tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagBankCommandant.description: A tapestry with a star symbol indicating that the commandant lives here.

OE14WallmountFlagGuardSwords.name: guard tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagGuardSwords.description: A tapestry with a swords symbol denoting that the guards are here.

OE14WallmountFlagGuardShield.name: guard tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagGuardShield.description: A tapestry with a shield symbol denoting that the guards are here.

OE14WallmountFlagGuardCommander.name: guard commander tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagGuardCommander.description: A tapestry with a star symbol indicating that the Guard Commandant lives here.

OE14WallmountPaintingCandle.name: candle painting
OE14WallmountPaintingCandle.description: A nicely drawn candle in a frame.

OE14WallmountPaintingWoman.name: painting of a woman
OE14WallmountPaintingWoman.description: The painting depicts a woman with a mysterious smile.

OE14WallmountPaintingSaint.name: painting of a saint
OE14WallmountPaintingSaint.description: A drawing of a nun with a halo over her head. This is how you can feel the holiness of the picture.

OE14StatueAngel.name: angel statue
OE14StatueAngel.description: A divine statue of a praying angel.

OE14StatueStoneHeadHigh.name: stone head
OE14StatueStoneHeadHigh.description: Strange stone heads, they seem to be watching.

OE14StatueWizard.name: statue wizard
OE14StatueWizard.description: A statue of a magician holding magic.

OE14BaseTombstone.name: tombstone
OE14BaseTombstone.description: A piece of stone placed in memory of the dead.

OE14BaseFenceBig.name: big fence
OE14BaseFenceBig.description: You definitely need a towel to get to the other side

OE14BaseFenceGateBig.name: fence big gate
OE14BaseFenceGateBig.description: Big man-sized gates. What's your next move?

OE14Cliff.name: cliff
OE14Cliff.description: Severe unevenness of the natural landscape.

OE14BaseFence.name: fence
OE14BaseFence.description: A low fence restricting movement in a purely nominal way.

OE14BaseFenceGate.name: fence gate
OE14BaseFenceGate.description: You have two paths. You can open the door like a normal person, or you can climb over the door like a funny person.

OE14BaseFenceWindow.name: fence window
OE14BaseFenceWindow.description: You can slip an object in here, but you sure as hell can't fit through.

OE14Chasm.name: chasm
OE14Chasm.description: You can't even see the bottom.

OE14FloorLava.name: lava
OE14FloorLava.description: Don't jump in. It's not worth it, no matter how funny it is.

OE14FloorWaterOptimized.name: water
OE14FloorWaterOptimized.description: A trough of plain water. Clean enough for consumption

OE14DemiplaneHint.name: astral crack
OE14DemiplaneHint.description: Those cracks always lead to a way out of the damn place

OE14HighBush.name: high bush
OE14HighBush.description: Very tall and dense thickets. Perhaps someone is watching you from them

OE14BaseRock.name: rock
OE14BaseRock.description: A piece of rock. Hard, heavy, useless.

OE14RoyalPumpkin.name: royal pumpkin
OE14RoyalPumpkin.description: It's a huge pumpkin, it feels like you could even make a carriage out of it.

OE14Snowdrift.name: snowdrift
OE14Snowdrift.description: A big, cold pile of snow.

OE14BaseTree.name: tree
OE14BaseTree.description: Decades of life and growth, saturating the surrounding nature with fresh air.

OE14CrystalBase.name: quartz
OE14CrystalBase.description: Natural quartz crystals that can absorb the magical energy of the world around them.

OE14PlantCabbage.name: cabbage
OE14PlantCabbage.description: You see a cabbage in front of you. Perhaps you were born in one.

OE14PlantCotton.name: cotton
OE14PlantCotton.description: In a way, you're growing future clothes.

OE14PlantCucumber.name: cucumber
OE14PlantCucumber.description: Don't trust people who know how to turn into pickles.

OE14PlantOnion.name: onion
OE14PlantOnion.description: He's so cute it brings tears to my eyes to cut him up.

OE14PlantPepper.name: pepper
OE14PlantPepper.description: Russian roulette. Are you hot, or are you sweet peppers?

OE14PlantPotato.name: potato
OE14PlantPotato.description: Some like to associate themselves with potatoes. People like that are not bad people.

OE14PlantPumpkin.name: pumpkin
OE14PlantPumpkin.description: Legends say there is a pumpkin king who stares into your soul through the crowns of trees.

OE14PlantSage.name: sage
OE14PlantSage.description: Medicinal sage. Some love it for its medicinal properties, others for its narcotic properties. Which side are you on?

OE14PlantTomatoes.name: tomatoes
OE14PlantTomatoes.description: On the one hand, it's a delicious fruit. But why eat it when it's much more fun to use tomatoes as a throwing projectile?

OE14PlantWheat.name: wheat
OE14PlantWheat.description: Most popular crop. Unpretentious, it opens the way to an abundance of flour products.

OE14GatherableBloodFlower.name: blood rose
OE14GatherableBloodFlower.description: Scarlet flowers growing where blood has been spilled.

OE14GatherableBlueAmanita.name: blue Amanita
OE14GatherableBlueAmanita.description: A sky blue flower known for its medicinal and magical properties.

OE14GatherableChromiumSlime.name: chromium slime
OE14GatherableChromiumSlime.description: This rare thick substance can be found in a stream of water as if it has a mind of its own. When trying to change the slime itself - the slime changes the reagent it interacts with.

OE14GatherableDayflin.name: yellow dayflin
OE14GatherableDayflin.description: A yellow sun flower that smells like melted milk. Can be processed into a yellow dye.

OE14GatherableFlyAgaric.name: fly agaric
OE14GatherableFlyAgaric.description: This poisonous mushroom can often be found near bodies of water or other wet areas. It is not recommended for consumption.

OE14GatherableLumiMushroom.name: lumishroom
OE14GatherableLumiMushroom.description: A faintly luminous mushroom. Often used by alchemists as a means of concentrating solutions.

OE14WaterLilies.name: water lilies
OE14WaterLilies.description: Wow, these are plants that don't grow on land, but on water! Nature is amazing.

OE14WaterReeds.name: reed
OE14WaterReeds.description: Usually grows in swamps and on river banks.

OE14GatherableWildSage.name: wild sage
OE14GatherableWildSage.description: Root of this ubiquitous medicinal plant not bad at healing physical injuries, and inducing coughing.

OE14Bonfire.name: bonfire
OE14Bonfire.description: A pile of logs stacked together, ready to burst into flames at the slightest spark.

OE14IronCabinet.name: iron cabinet
OE14IronCabinet.description: an iron cabinet. Sturdy, lockable. You can store your valuables here without fear of some burglar taking it all for himself.

OE14ClosetGlassShowcase.name: glass showcase
OE14ClosetGlassShowcase.description: Something of value can be placed here without fear of it being discreetly stolen!

OE14Lamppost.name: lamppost
OE14Lamppost.description: A lantern hanging from a pole.

OE14LamppostBlue.name: lamppost
OE14LamppostBlue.description: A lantern hanging from a pole.

OE14PottedPlantBase.name: potted plant
OE14PottedPlantBase.description: A domesticated plant in a clay pot, more plants.

OE14TableWooden.name: wooden table
OE14TableWooden.description: A simple table made of boards.

OE14TableWoodenRound.name: round wooden table
OE14TableWoodenRound.description: A simple table made of boards.

OE14BaseTorch.description: A good, reliable light source. Too bad it doesn't last.

OE14WallmountBarShelfA.name: bar shelf
OE14WallmountBarShelfA.description: Wall shelves to store your wine collection

OE14BaseRoof.name: roof
OE14BaseRoof.description: A roof over your head to protect you from the heat of the sun or the weather.

OE14AlchemyFurnace.name: alchemy furnace
OE14AlchemyFurnace.description: A furnace fueled by wood, coal, or any other burning material. Handy for heating your alchemical potions.

OE14BaseSharpeningStoneStructure.name: stationary sharpening stone
OE14BaseSharpeningStoneStructure.description: A strong, durable sharpening stone capable of sharpening weapons without much damage to them.

OE14DemiplanRiftCore.name: demiplan rift core
OE14DemiplanRiftCore.description: A subtle connection between the real world and the demiplane where the adventurers went. Sooner or later they will return from there.

OE14DemiplaneTimedRadiusPassway.name: pulsating demiplane rift
OE14DemiplaneTimedRadiusPassway.description: This rift is gaining strength, and will trap all nearby creatures in a demiplane in a second!

OE14DemiplanePassway.name: demiplane rift
OE14DemiplanePassway.description: A gap in space that allows you to travel between world and demiplanes.

OE14DemiplaneLinkCrystal.name: demiplane link crystal
OE14DemiplaneLinkCrystal.description: Maintains communication with the demiplanes while charged. Causes mosnters from the demiplanes to attack the city. Once it is discharged, the game is over.

OE14PortalFrameCrystal.name: portal frame
OE14PortalFrameCrystal.description: A structure made of shadow crystals used to create a stable portal to another location.

OE14DemiplaneCore.name: demiplane core
OE14DemiplaneCore.description: The heart of the demiplane. Your task is to take it out of the demiplane safe and sound and hand it over to the guildmaster.

OE14CashConverter.name: cash converter
OE14CashConverter.description: A simple magical device connected by small portals to the empire's central bank. It allows you to convert coins between denominations, and doesn't even charge interest! That's generous.

OE14TradingBoardBase.name: trading information board
OE14TradingBoardBase.description: Allows you to track what is selling and buying right now.

OE14TradingPortalBase.name: trade cabinet
OE14TradingPortalBase.description: A dimensional closet connected to a similar closet elsewhere. Not capable of moving living creatures, but great for trading at a distance.

OE14BaseEssenceNode.name: essence node
OE14BaseEssenceNode.description: A natural accumulation of magical essence.

OE14CrateDirtPitGrave.name: dirt pit
OE14CrateDirtPitGrave.description: There's something buried here... or someone...

OE14WallStone.name: rock
OE14WallStone.description: A solid stone natural wall. It has a cave-like coldness to it.

OE14WallStoneIndestructable.name: dense rock
OE14WallStoneIndestructable.description: An extremely durable stone. Your tools don't seem to be enough to break through it.

OE14WallDirt.name: earth wall
OE14WallDirt.description: A tall pile of dirt. Can a house be built from it?

OE14WallSnow.name: snow wall
OE14WallSnow.description: A tall pile of snow. Can a house be built from it?

OE14WallDimensit.name: dimensit wall
OE14WallDimensit.description: The solid form of the interdimensional continuum.

OE14WallStoneCopperOre.description: A solid stone natural wall. You can see the sharp flecks of copper in it.

OE14WallStoneIronOre.description: A solid stone natural wall. You can see the sharp flecks of iron in it.

OE14WallStoneGoldOre.description: A solid stone natural wall. You see the tantalizing particles of gold in it.

OE14WallStoneMithrilOre.description: A solid stone natural wall. You see the tantalizing particles of mithril in it.

OE14BaseWall.name: wall
OE14BaseWall.description: Sturdy enough to cover you from threats or cold winds.

OE14BaseWallFrame.description: This wall is now in an indeterminate state between existence and non-existence.

OE14WindowDirectional.name: directional window
OE14WindowDirectional.description: Don't smudge up the glass down there.

OE14WindowStoneBrick.name: stone brick window
OE14WindowStoneBrick.description: A stone brick wall with a glass window in it.

OE14WindowMarbleBrick.name: marble brick window
OE14WindowMarbleBrick.description: A stone brick wall with a glass window in it.

OE14AstralCorrosion.name: astral corrosion
OE14AstralCorrosion.description: Glowing cracks in reality. It's probably fine.

OE14FlameCreationArtificialFlame.name: artificial flame
OE14FlameCreationArtificialFlame.description: A magically created artificial flame burning directly into the air. Not a bad light source, or a weapon if you throw it in someone's face.

OE14LiquidDropWater.name: floating liquid drop
OE14LiquidDropWater.description: A clot of liquid held in the shape of a ball by magic

OE14ClothingCloakMaidArpon.name: maid's apron
OE14ClothingCloakMaidArpon.description: Cleanliness, orderliness and obedience are the main traits of a good maid.

OE14ClothingCloakAlchemist.name: alchemist's cloak
OE14ClothingCloakAlchemist.description: An expensive fabric that can withstand acid splashes - the standard for alchemist experts.

OE14ClothingCloakBlacksmithArpon.name: blacksmith's apron
OE14ClothingCloakBlacksmithArpon.description: Loose leather strips, still actually being clothing.

OE14ClothingCloakCaptainJacket.name: captain's jacket
OE14ClothingCloakCaptainJacket.description: the colors white and gold tell you that you're looking at a higher power.

OE14ClothingCloakCommandantJacket.name: commandant's cape
OE14ClothingCloakCommandantJacket.description: The colors white and gold tell you that you're looking at a higher power.

OE14ClothingCloakGuildmasterCape.name: guildmaster cape
OE14ClothingCloakGuildmasterCape.description: The colors green and gold tell you that you're looking at a higher power.

OE14ClothingOuterClothingGreenVest.name: green vest
OE14ClothingOuterClothingGreenVest.description: Stylish green vest with gold buttons.

OE14ClothingOuterClothingRedVest.name: red vest
OE14ClothingOuterClothingRedVest.description: Stylish red vest with gold flecks.

OE14ClothingOuterClothingBrownVest1.name: brown vest
OE14ClothingOuterClothingBrownVest1.description: A simple, decent leather vest. It's kind of stylish.

OE14ClothingOuterClothingBrownVest2.name: brown vest with clasps
OE14ClothingOuterClothingBrownVest2.description: The same plain brown leather vest, but with clasps.

OE14ClothingOuterClothingBrownVest3.name: lightweight leather vest
OE14ClothingOuterClothingBrownVest3.description: Two flaps of leather connected by a belt from below.

OE14ClothingOuterClothingJagermeisterWai.name: jagermeister's waistcoat
OE14ClothingOuterClothingJagermeisterWai.description: Doesn't interfere with movement, looks restrained. Time to go hunting.

OE14ClothingOuterClothingMerchantWaistCo.name: merchant's waistcoat
OE14ClothingOuterClothingMerchantWaistCo.description: Stylish waistcoat made of expensive leather. A special uniform for merchants that makes customers feel like beggars.

OE14MobIceSpectre.name: icy spectre
OE14MobIceSpectre.description: The unburied soul of frozen adventurers. Her rage against the world robs her of her reason.

OE14MobMonsterMosquito.name: bloodworm mosquitoes
OE14MobMonsterMosquito.description: A bloodthirsty swarm of small mosquitoes just waiting for a soft flesh for a bloody feast.

OE14MobWatcherBase.name: watcher
OE14MobWatcherBase.description: It's like it's staring right through you.

OE14FoodTomatoes.name: tomatoes
OE14FoodTomatoes.description: A red, juicy tomato. You just want to throw it in someone's face!

OE14Snowball.name: snowball
OE14Snowball.description: A small handful of snow, handy for throwing.

OE14ManaOperationGlove.name: mana glove
OE14ManaOperationGlove.description: An unsophisticated but aesthetically pleasing blend of technology and magic crystals that allows you to operate with raw mana: siphoning it from some objects and pumping it into others.

OE14CrystalLamp.name: crystal lamp
OE14CrystalLamp.description: A device that converts energy from crystals into a source of directional light.  Convenient for traveling

OE14Torch.name: torch
OE14Torch.description: At its core, a stick burning on one side. Used to light up the area.

OE14MagicHealingStaff.name: magic healing staff
OE14MagicHealingStaff.description: A long, half-tech, half-magic stick designed to convert magical energy into healing spells.

OE14BaseShield.name: shield
OE14BaseShield.description: A wooden shield capable of withstanding multiple blows.

OE14BaseMop.name: wooden mop
OE14BaseMop.description: Mop for cleaning floors from various unpleasant liquids

OE14BaseWrench.name: wrench
OE14BaseWrench.description: A common tool for assembly and disassembly. Remember: lefty latchy, righty removey.

OE14CobwebRight1.name: cobweb
OE14CobwebRight1.description: The sticky web is surprisingly strong and unpleasant.

OE14WallmountFlagBase.name: tapestry
OE14WallmountFlagBase.description: A piece of cloth pinned to the wall.

OE14WallmauntGarlandBase.name: crystals garland
OE14WallmauntGarlandBase.description: Carefully crafted sparkling crystals tied on a string. For a festive attitude.

OE14IronDoor.name: iron door
OE14IronDoor.description: Well, if there's a solid iron door, there must be something valuable behind it.

OE14IronDoorWindowed.name: iron windowed door
OE14IronDoorWindowed.description: a solid iron door with a small window. You can look through it, of course, but it's hard to put your hand through.

OE14WoodenDoor.name: wooden door
OE14WoodenDoor.description: Not the most solid construction, but it's better than nothing.

OE14WoodenDoorWindowed.name: wooden windowed door
OE14WoodenDoorWindowed.description: Not the most solid construction, but it's better than nothing.

OE14GatherableWaterAirLily.name: air lily
OE14GatherableWaterAirLily.description: A light, delicate and airy flower. It is said that its special properties even allow it to breathe underwater...

OE14BaseBarrel.name: wooden barrel
OE14BaseBarrel.description: The simplest design for storing liquids.

OE14CraneBarrel.name: wooden crane barrel
OE14CraneBarrel.description: Large lying barrel with tap, for storing valuable liquids.

OE14CraneBarrelSmall.name: wooden small crane barrel
OE14CraneBarrelSmall.description: A small lying barrel with a tap to quickly pour liquid into mugs.

OE14BenchWood.name: wood bench
OE14BenchWood.description: A bench carved from wood, a comfortable part of the interior designed for sitting and relaxing.

OE14ChairWooden.name: wooden chair
OE14ChairWooden.description: Made of the most common planks. Simple and effective!

OE14Mannequin.name: mannequin
OE14Mannequin.description: A handy stand for clothing or armour.

OE14Safe.name: safe
OE14Safe.description: A giant iron box for storing your most precious possessions. Extremely heavy and extremely strong.

OE14TargetStake.name: target stake
OE14TargetStake.description: A wooden stand on which to fix a target for firing.

OE14TargetEffigy.name: target effigy
OE14TargetEffigy.description: The target is a scarecrow for practising close combat strikes.... or magic.

OE14WallmountLampEmpty.name: crystal wall lamp
OE14WallmountLampEmpty.description: A simple wallmount magical device that converts crystal energy into bright light.

OE14WallmountOrdersBorder.name: orders board
